project_description: This project is a mobile application built using Flutter. It demonstrates UI design, navigation, and mobile app development concepts learned in the Mobile Programming course.
hoi_an_description: Hoi An Ancient Town is a UNESCO World Heritage site famous for its preserved architecture and colorful lantern streets.
hoi_an_review: Beautiful lantern streets and peaceful river views.
